classObjective: Calculate the perimeter, circumference, and area of two-dimensional figures from coordinate grids and labeled diagrams.
workedExamples: 11-3, Example 1 — Find Perimeter and Area from Grid Figures
11-3, Example 2 — Calculate Measurements Using Two-Dimensional Models
warmUp: What is the area of a rectangle with length 8 and width 5?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: perimeter, circumference, and area formulas; applying to figures from coordinate grids and labeled diagrams
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice calculating perimeters, circumferences, and areas from various figure representations
independentPractice: Practice problems finding perimeter, circumference, and area of two-dimensional figures
assessment: Exit ticket: find the perimeter and area of a figure plotted on a coordinate grid
capReflection: How does working with figures on coordinate grids connect geometry to algebra?
